goal: Manufacturer-confirmed HP widths for PatchHive module_catalog rows with null hp
rules: OBSERVED only from official manufacturer pages, manuals, or reputable retailers (Perfect Circuit, Thomann)
Never invent HP. If not found, leave hp null and set status=not_found
Use multi-source rotation; do not hammer ModularGrid
Prefer active modules; discontinued OK if official archive lists HP
Output JSON array of {brand, name, slug, hp, source_url, provenance, notes}
